_comment: Front-page news strip. Newest first. 'pinned: true' floats a post to the top. A post is EITHER a normal text post (title/body, optional image, link and sections) OR an embedded social post: set 'embed' to a LinkedIn, Instagram or YouTube link and it renders that post instead. Only those hosts are allowed. 'sections' renders grouped bullet lists, each with a heading.

announcements.title: 2025-26 Season: Chrysalis Final Placements
announcements.body: Last weekend NYU Concrete Canoe placed 3rd at the 39th Annual ASCE Concrete Canoe Society-Wide Finals at Fairmont State University. Competing against teams from across the United States, Canada, China and India, we secured the highest placement ever achieved in school history. Chrysalis embodied the theme of transformation and growth, a reflection of our team's journey, and introduced three major innovations: a carbon-negative concrete mix using carbon-sequestering recycled concrete fines, a segmental modular mold, and an open-source AI-powered paddling application.

announcements.title: NYU Tandon on our national result
Clean Sweep at Metropolitan Regionals
announcements.body: At the 2026 ASCE Metropolitan Student Symposium hosted at The College of New Jersey, NYU Concrete Canoe won 1st place in every single judged category, which qualified our team for nationals.

announcements.title: New Members Welcome
announcements.body: No experience necessary. We train you. Whether you're interested in engineering, design, marketing, or project management, there's a place for you on the team.
